stories.title: Donovan leaves Bulls amid sweeping changes
stories.summary: Billy Donovan has decided to step down as head coach of the Bulls after six seasons.

stories.title: McCollum plays MSG villain as Hawks tie series
stories.summary: CJ McCollum became the latest to join the list of Madison Square Garden villains as his fourth-quarter exploits helped the Hawks tie their first-round series against the Knicks with a come-from-behind 107-106 win in Game 2.

stories.title: McDaniels jab: Nuggets are 'all bad defenders'
stories.summary: Jaden McDaniels took perhaps his most notable shot after Minnesota's 119-114 Game 2 playoff win at Denver, saying the Nuggets are "all bad defenders."

stories.title: Gobert carries DPOY snub into Jokic matchup, win
stories.summary: On the same day he finished fourth in Defensive Player of the Year voting, Timberwolves center Rudy Gobert held three-time MVP Nikola Jokic to 1-of-8 shooting in their Game 2 matchup, helping Minnesota to a series-tying 119-114 win.

stories.title: Sources: Madubuike has neck surgery, may return
stories.summary: Ravens DT Nnamdi Madubuike underwent neck surgery last week that left his doctors believing he will be able to resume playing this season, sources told ESPN.
